changeSet.author: ahri-inventory
changeSet.comment: Reclassify remaining CARTRIDGE rows that have equipment maintenance dates (instruments, not supplies). Run AUDIT_REMAINING_CARTRIDGE_WITH_EQUIPMENT_METADATA_SQL after deploy to verify no machine rows remain as CARTRIDGE.
changeSet.sql: UPDATE clinlims.inventory_item SET item_type = 'EQUIPMENT' WHERE item_type = 'CARTRIDGE' AND ( installation_date IS NOT NULL OR last_maintenance_date IS NOT NULL OR next_maintenance_date IS NOT NULL );
